subject: Fermi  trigger No 584264100 Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, E. Gorbovskoy, V.Kornilov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa, A.Kuznetsov, F.Balakin, 
V.Vladimirov, D. Vlasenko, I.Gorbunov, D.Zimnukhov, V.Senik, T.Pogrosheva, D.Kuvshinov 
(Lomonosov Moscow State University, SAI, Physics Department),

R. Podesta, C.Lopez, F. Podesta, C.Francile 
(Observatorio Astronomico Felix Aguilar OAFA),

H.Levato 
(Instituto de Ciencias Astronomicas, de la Tierra y del Espacio ICATE),

R. Rebolo, M. Serra 
(The Instituto de Astrofisica de Canarias)

D. Buckley 
(South African Astronomical Observatory),

O.A. Gres, N.M. Budnev, O.Ershova 
(Irkutsk State University, API),

A. Tlatov, D. Dormidontov 
(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

V. Yurkov, A. Gabovich, Yu. Sergienko 
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)




MASTER-Kislovodsk robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Russia (Lomonosov MSU, Kislovodsk Solar Station of Pulkovo observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB190708.32 (trigger No 584264100,  9h 30m 16.08s , +51d 43m 01.20s, R=26.83) errorbox  37698 sec after trigger time at 2019-07-08 18:03:13 UT, with upper limit up to  18.9 mag. Observations started at twilight.  The observations began at zenit distance = 61 deg. The sun  altitude  is -10.9 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -60 deg., longitude l = 98 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=1068595

We obtain a following upper limits.

   37999 | 2019-07-08 18:06:44 |   MASTER-Kislovodsk | ( 10h  8m 31.29s , +31d 54m 50.66s) |   C |   180 | 16.2 |        
   38000 | 2019-07-08 18:06:44 |   MASTER-Kislovodsk | (  9h 58m 59.85s , +32d 21m 22.28s) |   C |   180 | 16.8 |        
   38420 | 2019-07-08 18:13:44 |   MASTER-Kislovodsk | ( 11h 15m 27.68s , +47d 57m 02.42s) |   C |   180 | 18.2 |        
   38420 | 2019-07-08 18:13:44 |   MASTER-Kislovodsk | ( 11h  3m 07.26s , +48d 23m 44.21s) |   C |   180 | 18.9 |        
Filter C is a clear (unfiltred) band. 


The observation and reduction will continue. 
The message may be cited.
